# title

**Instance Property**

A primary text for the notification.

## Declaration

```swift
let title: String?
```

## Discussion

This property contains the notification’s main display text. For supplementary text, see [doc://com.apple.accessorynotifications/documentation/AccessoryNotifications/AccessoryNotification/subtitle].

## Displaying notification content

- **subtitle**: Secondary text for the notification.
- **body**: A string that contains the notification’s main content.
- **summary**: An Apple Intelligence summary for the notification.
